company.name: QorvixNode Technologies
company.description: QorvixNode Technologies is a software development company delivering custom websites, Android apps, AI automation, CRMs, business software and end-to-end digital solutions for modern businesses.
company.services: ["Custom Website Development","Android App Development","AI Automation","Business Software","CRM Development","E-Commerce Website","Portfolio Website","Landing Pages","Dashboard Development","UI/UX Design","API Integration","Hosting","Deployment","Maintenance"]
company.greetingMsg: Hi! 👋 Welcome to QorvixNode Technologies. We build custom websites, Android apps, AI automation, CRMs and business software. Tell us what you're looking for and we'll guide you from there.
company.closingMsg: Thanks for chatting with QorvixNode Technologies! We will follow up shortly. 🙏
company.supportMsg: For urgent support, reply with "talk to owner" and our team will reach out.

apiSetting.systemPrompt: You are the official WhatsApp AI assistant for QorvixNode Technologies. Be concise, friendly, professional. Reply in the customer language.

autoReplySetting.greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to QorvixNode Technologies — we build websites, apps & AI automation. How can we help?
autoReplySetting.awayMessage: We're currently away. Leave your requirement and we'll reply during business hours (Mon-Sat 9-7 IST). 🙏
